view.title: Jonga VPS {id}
view.cpanelNote: Ipaneli yolawulo kufuneka ifakwe kwi-OS ecocekileyo engaguqulwanga. Ukuba kukho idatha iya kulahleka.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuthumela kwakhona i-imeyili yamkelo?
view.emailSentMessage: I-imeyili yamkelo ithunyiwe kwakhona. Jonga ibhokisi yakho yongeno.

order.title: Odola VPS
order.rootPasswordNote: Qaphela: Igama lokusebenzisa kufuneka linazo ubuncinane izinhlamvu ezisi-8, ühlamvu oluncinci, ühlamvu olukhulu, inombolo, nophawu olukhethekileyo.
order.subscriptionRenewal: Isivumelwano siya kuvuselela ngokuzenzekelayo emva kwe-{period} ngo-{cost} ude urhoxise.
order.tosAcknowledgment: Ngokuphawula le bhokisi, uyavuma ukuba uyathenga iproducthi yesivumelwano evuselela ngokuzenzekelayo kwaye ihlawulwa kwikhadi loLwabelwano oluphetheyo namhlanje. Ukuba ufuna ukurhoxisa ukuvuselela kwakho ngokuzenzekelayo, unayifikelela kwiwebhu yomxhasi ukhethe inkonzo esebenzayo uwuloke isixhobo sokurhoxisa okanye uthumele imeyili ku: billing{'@'}interserver.net okanye usebenzise enye indlela echazwe kuMiqathango neeMeko. Ngokuphawula ibhokisi kwaye ucofe Beka i-odola yam ngezantsi, uyavuma ubuye wafunda, uyaqonda, kwaye uyavuma neMiqathango neeMeko neNqubela yaBuMfihlo bethu.

buyHdSpace.title: Indawo eNgezelelweyo yeDrive ye-VPS
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Ubuncinane 1 ukuya kwi-100GB yendawo ye-HD eNgezelelweyo inokuthenga

changeRootPassword.title: Guqula igama lokusebenzisa elimgogobala we-VPS
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Igama lokusebenzisa nokuQinisekisa igama lokusebenzisa akafani

changeTimezone.title: Guqula umda wexesha we-{module}
changeTimezone.importantNote1: Kufuneka ucime {module} wakho ngokupheleleyo ngaphambi kokutshintsha umda wexesha.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: VPS iya kucimwa kwaye iqalwe ngokutsha phakathi kwenkqubo.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: Umda wexesha kweli phepha uhlala eqala ku-America/New_York nangaphezulu koko iseva yakho esetiweyo.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Guqula igama lokusebenzisa lomphathi we-Webuzo
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Igama lokusebenzisa nokuQinisekisa igama lokusebenzisa akafani

reinstallOs.title: Faka kwakhona i-OS
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Ukufaka kwakhona inkqubo yokusebenza kuya kususa yonke idatha.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Ngaphambi kokufaka kwakhona inkqubo yokusebenza, nceda wenze ukulondoloza.

resetPassword.title: Seta kwakhona igama lokusebenzisa le-VPS
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Ukuseta kwakhona igama lokusebenzisa kwe-Windows kuya kukhokelela ekucimweni ngokungacocekanga. Nceda ucinge le nkqubo njengendlela yokugqibela. Qinisekisa kwi-VNC ukuba akukho zihlaziyo ezisebenzayo okwangoku. Ukuba uhlaziyo lusebenza i-VNC iya kubonisa: I-Windows iyasebenzisa izihlaziyo, ungacimi. Ukucima kulomeko kunokukhokelela kumshini ongenakuqala.

reverseDns.title: I-DNS eguqukayo
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Ukutshintsha kwe-DNS eguqukayo kuthatha ixesha eliyi-awa ukubonakala.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Iyafumaneka kuphela kwiqonga le-Windows. Idesktop ekude yindlela ekhawulezayo nelula yokuxhuma kwidesktop yomshini onobuntu.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: Igama lokusebenzisa lomphathi kufuneka lisetwe kwa-VPS ngaphambi kokuba usebenzise idesktop ekude.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Xhuma nge-VNC okanye i-HTML5 VNC ukuseta igama lakho lokusebenzisa lokuqala.
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC ikuvumela ukuxhuma kwidesktop yomshini onobuntu. VNC ingasebenziswa kwibhrawuza okanye njengesixhobo esizimeleyo. Idilesi ye-IP yekhompiyutha yakho kufuneka inikezwe ukungena ngaphambi kokuba uqhagamshelwano lungaqinisekiswa.
vnc.grantIpWait: Nceda ulinde imizuzu emi-2 ukuba isenzo sigqibele.
vnc.vncClientNote: Ungakhuphela enye yeeklikhente ze-VNC ezininzi ezifumanekayo kwi-intanethi. Sicebisa TightVNC. Xhuma usebenzisa idilesi ye-IP ye-VPS yakho. Igama lokusebenzisa alifuneki emva kokuba idilesi yakho ye-IP ekude inikezwe kwinyathelo lokuqala.
vnc.html5Note: Iklikhente ye-HTML5 VNC esebenza kakuhle kwibhrawuza yesimanje neyimobilehttps kuquka iibhrawuza zemobile (iOS ne-Android).

insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Faka i-URL ye-CD okanye DVD ISO

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Ukugcinwa kuya kusebenza kuphela ngokwahlulwa okuqhelekileyo.

restore.offlineNote: Iseva yakho iya kuba ngaphandle kwenkonzo ngelixa itshintsha yonke iifayile zakho ngalezo zasekugcinweni. Nceda uqhagamshelane nenkxaso nemibuzo yonke.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Faka igama lokusebenzisa lokungena ukuqinisekisa ukubuyisela.

trafficUsage.title: Ukusetyenziswa kwe-Bandwidth / Trafikhi
trafficUsage.billingNote: Oku akusetyenziswanga ukubalcula ukuhlawula kwaye lisilinganiso kuphela esekelwe kwiikhadi zakho zomnatha obonakalayo.
